class.name: rover_electrical_hmi/PowerSummaryModule
class.description: Live battery and module power summary with CSV recording

class.name: rover_electrical_hmi/DrivetrainStopModule
class.description: Remote stop and release control for the drivetrain

class.name: rover_electrical_hmi/WheelTelemetryModule
class.description: Per-wheel speed, torque, temperature, and power telemetry table

class.name: rover_electrical_hmi/LightingModule
class.description: Lighting zone on/off, brightness, and auto-mode control

class.name: rover_electrical_hmi/VawTreeModule
class.description: Voltage, amperage, and wattage tree view of power and drivetrain systems

class.name: rover_electrical_hmi/PowerTimelineModule
class.description: Rolling power timeline canvas for battery and total power/current series
